title: Sunlit loft in Kreuzberg with rooftop access.
description:
Wake up to golden light flooding the exposed-brick living room of this industrial loft on one of Kreuzberg's quietest side streets. The open-plan space has soaring 3.5m ceilings, a well-equipped kitchen island, and a dedicated work corner with a standing desk and fiber broadband — everything you need to stay productive or completely switch off.

Head up to the shared rooftop terrace on the fifth floor for sunset cocktails with a panoramic view across the canal to Neukölln. It's a five-minute stroll to the weekend market at Görlitzer Park and another five to the Landwehr Canal — the best cycling and walking route in the city.

We're proud of this neighbourhood and happy to share our list of favourite spots: the coffee roastery around the corner, the vinyl shop on Paul-Lincke-Ufer, the best döner in Kreuzberg (hint: it's not the famous one). You'll leave knowing the city like a local.
